text: Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmail Baghaei: Ship traffic through the Strait of Hormuz will take place along routes designated by Iran and in coordination with relevant Iranian authorities. Iran is the guardian of the Strait of Hormuz and will show no leniency in implementing measures necessary to protect its national interests and rights. Media and the public should not be swayed by the other side’s media narrative.
text_zh: 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊：通过霍尔木兹海峡的船舶交通将沿着伊朗指定的路线进行，并与伊朗相关当局协调。伊朗是霍尔木兹海峡的守护者，在实施保护其国家利益和权利的必要措施时，绝不会手软。媒体和公众不应被对方的媒体叙事所左右。

text: Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmail Baghaei: If we see bad faith, we will respond accordingly.
text_zh: 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊：如果我们看到恶意，我们将做出相应的回应。

text: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 About 20,000 seafarers and two thousand ships carrying 132 mln barrels of oil are blocked in the Persian Gulf, CNN reports. The authorities have less than a week to help them out because the Strait of Hormuz is being opened until the end of the ceasefire period. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 据CNN报道，约2万名海员和两千艘载有1.32亿桶石油的船只被困在波斯湾。当局只有不到一周的时间来帮助他们脱困，因为霍尔木兹海峡仅在停火期结束前开放。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: A source told Tasnim that Iran was prepared to strike Israel at 20:00 last night if a Lebanon ceasefire wasn’t implemented, but held off after Trump announced a ceasefire.
text_zh: 一位消息人士告诉塔斯尼姆通讯社，如果黎巴嫩停火协议没有实施，伊朗准备在昨晚20:00打击以色列，但在特朗普宣布停火后推迟了行动。

text: MarineTraffic says the cruise ship Celestyal Discovery is the first passenger vessel to transit the Strait of Hormuz since the conflict began.
text_zh: MarineTraffic称，Celestyal Discovery号邮轮是自冲突开始以来第一艘通过霍尔木兹海峡的客运船只。

text: Iranian official to Reuters: No agreement has been reached on the details of the nuclear issues.
text_zh: 伊朗官员对路透社表示：在核问题的细节上尚未达成协议。

text: An Iranian official told Reuters that keeping the Strait of Hormuz open is “conditional on U.S. adherence to the terms of the ceasefire.”
text_zh: 一位伊朗官员告诉路透社，保持霍尔木兹海峡畅通“取决于美国是否遵守停火条款”。

text: 🇮🇷 Minab School Attendance call "Help has arrived!". (reference to Trump's "help for the Iranian people") A quote by Mahmoud Darwish: "I do not know who sold the homeland, but I saw who paid the price." "In memory of the unjust martyrdom of 168 schoolgirls and boys from the Tayyibeh Minab school in Hormozgan province, on the morning of Saturday, 9 Esfand 1404 [= March 1, 2025], who were martyred by the direct strike ordered by the American terrorist president, Donald Trump." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 米纳布学校的出勤点名呼喊“援助已到！”（指特朗普对“伊朗人民的援助”）。马哈茂德·达尔维什的名言：“我不知道是谁出卖了祖国，但我看到了是谁付出了代价。”“纪念2025年3月1日星期六上午，在霍尔木兹甘省Tayyibeh Minab学校被美国恐怖主义总统唐纳德·特朗普下令直接打击而惨遭杀害的168名男女学生的冤魂。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: U.S. Central Command The U.S. naval blockade continues... https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2045202317385887933/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部：美国海军封锁仍在继续... https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2045202317385887933/video/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇮🇷 🤝 🇺🇸 Many ships have now lifted anchor and are moving toward the Strait of Hormuz from both sides. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2045202078868316643/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner转发 @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇮🇷 🤝 🇺🇸 许多船只现在已经起锚，正从两侧向霍尔木兹海峡移动。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2045202078868316643/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese President Joseph Aoun: "Our goal is the complete liberation of all Lebanese land, Israeli withdrawal, the return of the displaced to their homes, and the application of state control." "To the adventurers who are endangering the fate of Lebanon and the lives of the Lebanese, I say: enough. Only the state project in Lebanon is the strongest, the most enduring, and the safest for everyone." "We are no longer a card in anyone's pocket and an arena for anyone's wars, and we will never be like that again." "This negotiation is not weakness, not retreat, and not concession, but a decision stemming from the strength of our belief in our right, our concern for our people, and our refusal to die for anyone other than Lebanon." "The negotiations do not mean and will never mean a waiver of any right, no compromise on any principle, and no violation of state sovereignty." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩：“我们的目标是完全解放所有黎巴嫩土地、以色列撤军、流离失所者返回家园，以及实施国家控制。”“对于那些危及黎巴嫩命运和黎巴嫩人民生命的冒险家，我说：够了。只有黎巴嫩的国家项目才是最强大、最持久、对每个人最安全的。”“我们不再是谁口袋里的牌，也不是谁的战争竞技场，我们永远不会再那样了。”“这次谈判不是软弱，不是退缩，也不是让步，而是一个源于我们对自身权利的信念、对人民的关切以及拒绝为黎巴嫩以外的任何人而死的决定。”“谈判并不意味着，也永远不会意味着放弃任何权利，不妥协任何原则，也不侵犯国家主权。”推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump to Reuters: The US will easily enter Iran and take its enriched uranium tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普对路透社表示：美国将轻松进入伊朗并夺取其浓缩铀 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran Foreign Ministry Spokesman Ismail Baghaei: Iran is the guardian of the Strait of Hormuz and will not tolerate any place that requires the implementation of measures to ensure the interests and rights of the Iranian people. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045199787884990892/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊：伊朗是霍尔木兹海峡的守护者，不会容忍任何需要实施措施以确保伊朗人民利益和权利的地方。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045199787884990892/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Israeli sources: The U.S. and Iran are on the verge of a deal to remove enriched uranium from Iran and end Tehran's uranium enrichment. Iran's president and foreign minister favor the deal. The IRGC objects. Kan News. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 以色列消息人士：美国和伊朗即将达成一项协议，以从伊朗移除浓缩铀并结束德黑兰的铀浓缩活动。伊朗总统和外交部长支持该协议。伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队表示反对。Kan News。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) 🇺🇦 🇧🇾 Ukrainian intelligence reported to President Zelensky about the construction of roads and preparation of artillery positions on the Belarusian side of the border with Ukraine. "We believe that Russia will once again try to draw Belarus into its war. I instructed the relevant channels to warn the de facto leadership of Belarus about Ukraine's readiness to defend its land and independence," Zelensky said. /18718 tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻） 🇺🇦 🇧🇾 乌克兰情报部门向泽连斯基总统报告了在乌克兰边境白俄罗斯一侧修建道路和准备炮兵阵地的情况。“我们认为俄罗斯将再次试图将白俄罗斯拖入其战争。我指示相关渠道警告白俄罗斯事实上的领导层，乌克兰已做好保卫其土地和独立的准备，”泽连斯基说。/18718 推文

text: OSINTtechnical A flood of tankers and cargo ships are making a break for the Strait of Hormuz to exit the Persian Gulf. Nearly 3 dozen ships can be seen sailing for the Strait via @MarineTraffic , including vessels declaring Chinese, Indian, and French ownership. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045199018779689085/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 大量油轮和货船正冲向霍尔木兹海峡以离开波斯湾。通过@MarineTraffic可以看到近30艘船只正航向海峡，其中包括宣布由中国、印度和法国拥有的船只。https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045199018779689085/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel An Iranian military source told Tasnim that Iran planned to attack Israel last night at 8 PM and had completed all preparations, but reversed course after Trump's ceasefire declaration at 7 PM. Tehran is trying to take credit for the Lebanon ceasefire. @kaisos1987 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 一位伊朗军事消息人士告诉塔斯尼姆通讯社，伊朗计划在昨晚8点袭击以色列，并已完成所有准备工作，但在特朗普晚上7点宣布停火后改变了方针。德黑兰正试图将黎巴嫩停火归功于自己。@kaisos1987 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ‼️ 🇺🇦 🇬🇪 🫡 The founder of Azov and legendary Georgian fighter, Giorgi Kuparashvili, has been appointed commander of a mechanized regiment within the Azov 3rd Army Corps. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2045198565585121622/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner转发 @NSTRIKE1231 : ‼️ 🇺🇦 🇬🇪 🫡 亚速营创始人、传奇格鲁吉亚战士乔治·库帕拉什维利被任命为亚速第3军团内一个机械化团的指挥官。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2045198565585121622/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iranian official to Reuters: Ships can still transit the Strait of Hormuz but must coordinate passage with the IRGC. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗官员对路透社表示：船只仍然可以通过霍尔木兹海峡，但必须与伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队协调通行。推文

text: Macron and Meloni had a rather awkward interaction today.
text_zh: 马克龙和梅洛尼今天进行了一次相当尴尬的互动。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 Commander of the Iranian Navy Shahram Irani stated that every day ships are passing through the Strait of Hormuz under Iranian guidance: Every day, ships that observe protocol and possess international understanding are passing through. We even provide…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Commander of the Iranian Navy Shahram Irani stated that Iran is fighting against two "sinister regimes," referencing the United States and Israel: We are not at war with the world; we are at war with two sinister regimes. We will not allow them to pass. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 伊朗海军司令沙赫拉姆·伊拉尼表示，每天都有船只在伊朗的引导下通过霍尔木兹海峡：每天，遵守协议并具备国际理解的船只都在通过。我们甚至提供……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗海军司令沙赫拉姆·伊拉尼表示，伊朗正在与两个“邪恶政权”作战，指的是美国和以色列：我们不是在与世界作战；我们是在与两个邪恶政权作战。我们不会允许他们通过。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 Commander of the Iranian Navy Shahram Irani stated that "others" need Iran and that their respective demands must also be met. He also stated that U.S. President Donald Trump blocked himself and that Iran is not blockaded: "Others need us; they need…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Commander of the Iranian Navy Shahram Irani stated that every day ships are passing through the Strait of Hormuz under Iranian guidance: Every day, ships that observe protocol and possess international understanding are passing through. We even provide cover for them and they face no issues. Even when others issue warnings, these commercial ships ignore them and continue their route because they belong to nations like China, India, Australia, Korea, or Japan. They pass through and go on their way. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 伊朗海军司令沙赫拉姆·伊拉尼表示，“其他人”需要伊朗，他们的各自要求也必须得到满足。他还表示，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普封锁了他自己，而伊朗并没有被封锁：“其他人需要我们；他们需要……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗海军司令沙赫拉姆·伊拉尼表示，每天都有船只在伊朗的引导下通过霍尔木兹海峡：每天，遵守协议并具备国际理解的船只都在通过。我们甚至为它们提供掩护，它们不会面临任何问题。即使其他人发出警告，这些商船也会无视它们并继续航行，因为它们属于中国、印度、澳大利亚、韩国或日本等国家。它们通过并继续前行。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 "In line with the ceasefire in Lebanon, the passage for all commercial vessels through Strait of Hormuz is declared completely open for the remaining period of ceasefire." - Iranian FM Araghchi 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 "We don't have a new understanding. The ceasefire understanding is the same thing that was announced on April 2nd. One of the rightful demands of our people was that this ceasefire must include Lebanon as well." Iranian FM spokesperson Esmaeil Baghaei on Araghchi's announcement: From day one, the other side evaded regarding the inclusion of Lebanon in the ceasefire. After the ceasefire was announced in Lebanon last night, Iran reciprocally announced passage in the Strait of Hormuz based on the same coordinates previously announced. "The other side did not properly implement the ceasefire understanding. We also, reciprocally, took the necessary actions. They were complaining that passage in the Strait of Hormuz was not being done as it was supposed to be. What was the reason? The other side was not adhering to its commitments. Therefore, the other side decided to fulfill its commitments regarding stopping fire in Lebanon. We reciprocally ensure safe passage." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 “根据黎巴嫩停火协议，所有商船通过霍尔木兹海峡的通道在剩余停火期内宣布完全开放。” - 伊朗外交部长阿拉格齐 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 “我们没有新的谅解。停火谅解与4月2日宣布的内容相同。我们人民的正当要求之一是，这次停火也必须包括黎巴嫩。” 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊就阿拉格齐的声明表示：从第一天起，对方就在将黎巴嫩纳入停火范围的问题上进行回避。昨晚黎巴嫩宣布停火后，伊朗根据此前宣布的相同坐标，对等宣布了霍尔木兹海峡的通行。“对方没有妥善执行停火谅解。我们也对等地采取了必要行动。他们抱怨霍尔木兹海峡的通行没有按预期进行。原因是什么？对方没有履行其承诺。因此，对方决定履行其关于在黎巴嫩停止开火的承诺。我们对等地确保安全通行。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 Commander of the Iranian Navy Shahram Irani on U.S. President Donald Trump using the word Blockade: "One is left amazed that this person has used the term naval blockade, whereas this is the very definition of banditry and piracy." @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Commander of the Iranian Navy Shahram Irani stated that "others" need Iran and that their respective demands must also be met. He also stated that U.S. President Donald Trump blocked himself and that Iran is not blockaded: "Others need us; they need the Strait of Hormuz, and their requirements must be met. As for his talk of a blockade, well, he has first besieged himself and his so-called friends. We are not the ones being besieged." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 伊朗海军司令沙赫拉姆·伊拉尼就美国总统唐纳德·特朗普使用‘封锁’一词表示：‘令人惊讶的是，此人竟然使用了海军封锁这个词，而这正是强盗行为和海盗行为的定义。’ @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗海军司令沙赫拉姆·伊拉尼表示，“其他人”需要伊朗，他们的各自要求也必须得到满足。他还表示，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普封锁了他自己，而伊朗并没有被封锁：“其他人需要我们；他们需要霍尔木兹海峡，他们的要求必须得到满足。至于他关于封锁的言论，好吧，他首先围困了他自己和他所谓的盟友。我们并不是被围困的一方。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Commander of the Iranian Navy Shahram Irani on U.S. President Donald Trump using the word Blockade: "One is left amazed that this person has used the term naval blockade, whereas this is the very definition of banditry and piracy." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗海军司令沙赫拉姆·伊拉尼（Shahram Irani）就美国总统唐纳德·特朗普使用“封锁”一词回应称：“令人惊讶的是，此人竟然使用了‘海上封锁’这个词，而这正是强盗行径和海盗行为的定义。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Tasnim News Agency: An informed military source told Tasnim that if the ceasefire in Lebanon had not been reached, Iran intended to attack Israel at 8pm last night. All preparations were ready, including missile launchers set to destroy pre‑determined targets. The source said that the lack of a Lebanon truce would have constituted a complete violation of the ceasefire, and Iran’s patience was running out. U.S. President Trump announced the Lebanon ceasefire at around 7pm Iran time. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 塔斯尼姆通讯社：一位知情军事消息人士告诉塔斯尼姆通讯社，如果黎巴嫩未能达成停火协议，伊朗原计划于昨晚8点袭击以色列。所有准备工作均已就绪，包括旨在摧毁预定目标的导弹发射装置。消息人士称，黎巴嫩未能停火将构成对停火协议的彻底破坏，伊朗的耐心已耗尽。美国总统特朗普在伊朗时间晚上7点左右宣布了黎巴嫩停火协议。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 💬 Tasnim news agency: Iran planned to strike Israel last night if Lebanon ceasefire failed ➡️ A knowledgeable military source told Tasnim News Agency that Iran’s persistent efforts to secure Trump’s commitment to a ceasefire in Lebanon finally paid off overnight, forcing the Israeli regime to accept the truce. ➡️ The source added that I ran had decided to attack Israel at 8:00 PM local time if Trump failed to honor his commitment. ➡️ All necessary preparations had been made, including missile launchers placed in operational mode to destroy predetermined targets. ➡️ The source explained that any failure to implement the commitment would have effectively constituted a complete violation of the ceasefire, and Iran’s patience was running out. ➡️ According to Tasnim, Trump announced that a ceasefire in Lebanon was in place at around 7:00 PM Iran time. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 💬 塔斯尼姆通讯社：如果黎巴嫩停火失败，伊朗原计划昨晚袭击以色列 ➡️ 一位知情的军事消息人士告诉塔斯尼姆通讯社，伊朗为确保特朗普承诺在黎巴嫩实现停火所做的持续努力终于在昨晚取得成效，迫使以色列政权接受了停火。 ➡️ 消息人士补充说，如果特朗普未能履行承诺，伊朗已决定在当地时间晚上8:00袭击以色列。 ➡️ 所有必要的准备工作均已完成，包括将导弹发射装置置于作战模式以摧毁预定目标。 ➡️ 消息人士解释说，任何未能履行承诺的行为实际上都将构成对停火协议的彻底破坏，而伊朗的耐心已耗尽。 ➡️ 据塔斯尼姆通讯社报道，特朗普在伊朗时间晚上7:00左右宣布黎巴嫩停火协议生效。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Iran was one hour from striking Israel last night — Tasnim citing military sources. Launchers in operational mode aimed at predetermined targets, attack set for 8 PM. Stood down only after Trump delivered Lebanon ceasefire at 7 PM.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 据塔斯尼姆通讯社援引军事消息来源称，伊朗昨晚距离袭击以色列仅差一小时。发射装置处于作战模式，瞄准预定目标，袭击定于晚上8点进行。直到特朗普在晚上7点宣布黎巴嫩停火后，才取消了行动。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇱🇧🇺🇸 Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei stated that following the announcement of a ceasefire in Lebanon, a key Iranian demand, it has been decided to implement the original ceasefire understanding regarding safe transit through the Strait…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei explained that Iran had not implemented safe transit through the Strait of Hormuz because the other side failed to uphold its ceasefire commitments. Now that a ceasefire has taken effect in Lebanon, Iran will reciprocate. “The other side decided to fulfil its commitment regarding a ceasefire in Lebanon, and we, in return, have announced that transit through the Strait of Hormuz will be allowed based on the previously specified coordinates – that is, in coordination with Iranian authorities on designated routes, providing safe passage.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇱🇧🇺🇸 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊（Esmaeil Baghaei）表示，随着伊朗的一项关键要求——黎巴嫩停火协议的宣布，伊朗已决定执行关于霍尔木兹海峡安全过境的原始停火谅解……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊解释说，伊朗此前未执行霍尔木兹海峡的安全过境，是因为对方未能履行其停火承诺。现在黎巴嫩停火协议已经生效，伊朗将予以对等回应。“对方决定履行其关于黎巴嫩停火的承诺，作为回报，我们宣布将根据先前指定的坐标允许通过霍尔木兹海峡——即在指定航线上与伊朗当局协调，提供安全通道。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei stated that following the announcement of a ceasefire in Lebanon, a key Iranian demand, it has been decided to implement the original ceasefire understanding regarding safe transit through the Strait of Hormuz. He stressed that there is no new agreement; rather, the existing framework from 8 April is now being applied. “We have no new agreement. The ceasefire understanding is the same one announced on 8 April. Following the establishment of a ceasefire in Lebanon as an inseparable component of that understanding, the Islamic Republic of Iran will manage transit through the Strait of Hormuz in coordination with its armed forces and port authority.” Commercial vessels will be allowed to transit in coordination with Iranian authorities, as Iran is a littoral state managing the strait. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊表示，随着伊朗的一项关键要求——黎巴嫩停火协议的宣布，伊朗已决定执行关于霍尔木兹海峡安全过境的原始停火谅解。他强调，并没有达成新的协议，而是正在应用4月8日现有的框架。“我们没有达成任何新协议。停火谅解与4月8日宣布的相同。随着黎巴嫩停火协议的建立（这是该谅解不可分割的一部分），伊朗伊斯兰共和国将在其武装部队和港口管理局的协调下管理通过霍尔木兹海峡的过境。”作为管理该海峡的沿岸国，伊朗将允许商船在与伊朗当局协调的情况下通过。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 U.S. President Trump told Axios that the deal with Iran will "make Israel safe" and stressed "Israel is going to come out great" at the end of the war. At the same time, he stressed that Israeli strikes in Lebanon must end as part of Thursday’s ceasefire, saying, “Israel has to stop. They can't continue to blow buildings up. I am not gonna allow it." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 美国总统特朗普告诉 Axios，与伊朗达成的协议将“确保以色列的安全”，并强调在战争结束时“以色列将会表现得非常出色”。同时，他强调作为周四停火协议的一部分，以色列在黎巴嫩的袭击必须停止，并表示：“以色列必须停止。他们不能继续炸毁建筑物。我不会允许这种情况发生。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇧🇾🇺🇸 "In America every four years a new person comes to power, but politically nothing changes. The same course, the same problems, the same discussions. So maybe you have dictatorship inside the country?" Lukashenko says the USA only talks about democracy…" 🇧🇾 🇺🇸 "Trump showed the whole world that your United States of America is not omnipotent. It is not a super-force — it is a superpower, but not a super-force. Everyone understood this." Rick Sanchez asks Lukashenko if he thinks a day will ever come when the superpowers unite. Given the current situation, the President says it is difficult to believe that time will ever come. He called the war on Iran an "insane adventure" but says he's grateful for Trump for taking the mask off the USA. "If the Americans could not cope with Iran, I said this long ago, don't go to China!" 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇧🇾🇺🇸 ”在美国，每四年就会有一个新人上台，但在政治上什么都没有改变。同样的方针，同样的问题，同样的讨论。所以也许你们国家内部存在独裁？“卢卡申科说美国只谈论民主……” 🇧🇾 🇺🇸 “特朗普向全世界表明，你们美利坚合众国并非无所不能。它不是一股超级力量——它是一个超级大国，但不是一股超级力量。每个人都明白了这一点。” 里克·桑切斯问卢卡申科是否认为超级大国终有一天会联合起来。鉴于目前的情况，总统表示很难相信那一天会到来。他称对伊朗的战争是一场“疯狂的冒险”，但他表示感谢特朗普揭开了美国的假面具。“如果美国人连伊朗都对付不了，我早就说过，别去招惹中国！” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 BIG | Donald Trump: "The Strait of Hormuz is completely open and ready for commercial and full movement, but the naval blockade will remain in effect only against Iran until our deal with Iran is 100% completed. This process must proceed very quickly because an agreement has already been reached on most issues." See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 重大消息 | 唐纳德·特朗普：“霍尔木兹海峡已完全开放，随时准备进行商业和全面通行，但针对伊朗的海上封锁将继续有效，直到我们与伊朗的协议 100% 完成为止。这一进程必须非常迅速地进行，因为大多数问题已经达成一致。” 与我们一起查看最新动态： @visionergeo 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Ships can sail through Hormuz but must coordinate passage with the IRGC -Iranian official to Reuters tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 船只可以通过霍尔木兹海峡，但必须与伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队协调通行——伊朗官员告诉路透社 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF strikes on Iranian military industry infrastructure during the operation Roaring Lion. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045188411514925504/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列国防军在“咆哮狮子”行动期间对伊朗军事工业基础设施进行的打击。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045188411514925504/photo/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Ukraine context says Lukashenko will be gently warned about the consequences if he tries to pull Belarus into Russia’s war against Ukraine again. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045187972908106198/photo/1 Zelensky says Russia is trying to pull Belarus into the war as occupiers regroup to cover manpower gaps. Ukrainian intel reports road building and artillery positions near the border, and Kyiv has warned Belarus' leadership that Ukraine will defend its land. - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 乌克兰方面表示，如果卢卡申科再次试图将白俄罗斯拖入俄罗斯对乌克兰的战争，他将受到关于后果的温和警告。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045187972908106198/photo/1 泽连斯基表示，随着占领者重新集结以填补人力缺口，俄罗斯正试图将白俄罗斯拖入战争。乌克兰情报部门报告称，边境附近有道路建设和炮兵阵地，基辅已警告白俄罗斯领导层，乌克兰将保卫自己的土地。 - WarTranslated 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @noclador : Now wonder Venezuelan opposition leader Machado refused to meet Spain's Sánchez, who has been a big Maduro supporter for years. Anyway here is Machado meeting Meloni yesterday... https://twitter.com/noclador/status/2045166630422941708/photo/1 📺 TV en DIRECTO | Sánchez asegura que ofreció a la opositora venezolana María Corina Machado la posibilidad de reunirse, pero que ella no lo consideró oportuno http://shorturl.at/Yonox https://twitter.com/el_pais/status/2045136548224507932/video/1 - EL PAÍS tweet

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Kan: Trump's post about preventing attacks in Lebanon surprised senior officials in Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Kan：特朗普关于防止黎巴嫩袭击的帖子让以色列高级官员感到惊讶。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇷 🇱🇧 During the Lebanon ceasefire, commercial vessel passage through the Strait of Hormuz is fully open via Iran’s designated route. — Iran’s FM Araghchi" 🇮🇷 Iran’s FM spox Esmaeil Baqaei: The decision regarding transit in the Strait of Hormuz was not solely made by the Foreign Ministry; it is a decision of the Islamic Republic of Iran based on the country's decision-making system framework and in line with the commitments announced on April 8.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench 镜像：“🇮🇷 🇱🇧 在黎巴嫩停火期间，商业船只通过霍尔木兹海峡的通道通过伊朗指定的路线完全开放。——伊朗外交部长阿拉格齐” 🇮🇷 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊：关于霍尔木兹海峡过境的决定并非仅由外交部做出；这是伊朗伊斯兰共和国根据国家决策系统框架并符合 4 月 8 日宣布的承诺所做出的决定。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Lebanese president Joseph Aoun highlights the objective is clear and declared: To stop the Israeli aggression against our land and our people, secure an Israeli withdrawal, extend the authority of the state over its entire territory exclusively through…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Lebanese Joseph Aoun to the Displaced southerners: To the displaced, I say, “You will return to your homes.” To those who remained in their houses under danger, “Your sacrifices will not be in vain.” To those gambling with Lebanon’s fate and the lives of its people, I say, “Enough—only the state’s project in Lebanon is the strongest, the most enduring, and the safest for all.” And to the world, I say, “Lebanon will not be broken, its people will not die, and its rights will prevail.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩强调，目标明确且已宣布：停止以色列对我们土地和人民的侵略，确保以色列撤军，仅通过其自身力量将国家权力扩展到其整个领土……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩约瑟夫·奥恩对流离失所的南方人说：对于流离失所者，我说：“你们将回到自己的家园。” 对于那些在危险中留在家里的人，“你们的牺牲不会白费。” 对于那些拿黎巴嫩的命运及其人民的生命进行赌博的人，我说：“够了——只有黎巴嫩的国家项目才是最强大、最持久、对所有人最安全的。” 对于世界，我说：“黎巴嫩不会被摧毁，它的人民不会消亡，它的权利终将获胜。” @wfwitness

text: ❗️ Before the ceasefire The occupation army announced the injury of 67 officers and soldiers in the battles of South Lebanon during the past 48 hours. In this war, the IDF suffered 653 injuries and 13 deaths
text_zh: ❗️ 停火前 占领军宣布在过去 48 小时的南黎巴嫩战斗中，有 67 名军官和士兵受伤。在这场战争中，以色列国防军遭受了 653 人受伤和 13 人死亡

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Lebanese President Joseph Aoun assures Lebanon’s geographical integrity: I affirm, in the language of commitment and promise, that there will be no agreement that undermines our national rights, diminishes the dignity of our people, or relinquishes…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Lebanese president Joseph Aoun highlights the objective is clear and declared: To stop the Israeli aggression against our land and our people, secure an Israeli withdrawal, extend the authority of the state over its entire territory exclusively through its own forces, and ensure the return of detainees @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩保证黎巴嫩的领土完整：我以承诺和誓言的语言确认，不会有任何损害我们国家权利、贬低我们人民尊严或放弃……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩强调，目标明确且已宣布：停止以色列对我们土地和人民的侵略，确保以色列撤军，仅通过其自身力量将国家权力扩展到其整个领土，并确保被拘留者返回 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Lebanese President Joseph Aoun on Negotiations: Negotiations do not and will never mean relinquishing any right, conceding any principle, or compromising the sovereignty of this country. I will not allow a single Lebanese to die from this day forward…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Lebanese President Joseph Aoun assures Lebanon’s geographical integrity: I affirm, in the language of commitment and promise, that there will be no agreement that undermines our national rights, diminishes the dignity of our people, or relinquishes even a grain of this country’s soil. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩谈谈判：谈判并不意味着，也永远不会意味着放弃任何权利、让步任何原则或损害这个国家的主权。从今天起，我不会允许任何一个黎巴嫩人死去……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩保证黎巴嫩的地理完整性：我以承诺和誓言的语言确认，绝不会有任何协议会损害我们的国家权利、贬低我们人民的尊严，或放弃这个国家哪怕一粒土地。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱🇮🇷🇱🇧 Lebanese President Joseph Aoun slams Iran and Hezbollah: These negotiations are neither a sign of weakness, retreat, nor concession. They are a decision driven by our firm belief in our rights, our commitment to our people, and our responsibility…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Lebanese President Joseph Aoun on Negotiations: Negotiations do not and will never mean relinquishing any right, conceding any principle, or compromising the sovereignty of this country. I will not allow a single Lebanese to die from this day forward, nor the continued bleeding of my people, for the interests of others’ influence or the calculations of regional or distant power axes @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱🇮🇷🇱🇧 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩抨击伊朗和真主党：这些谈判既不是软弱、退缩，也不是让步的迹象。它们是一个基于我们对自身权利的坚定信念、对人民的承诺以及我们的责任而做出的决定……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩谈谈判：谈判并不意味着，也永远不会意味着放弃任何权利、让步任何原则或损害这个国家的主权。从今天起，我不会允许任何一个黎巴嫩人死去，也不会允许我的人民为了他人的利益影响或地区及遥远权力轴心的算计而继续流血。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧 Lebanese President Joseph aoun on the necessity of unity in the next phase: All Lebanese are in the same boat. Either we steer it wisely until we reach safe shores, or we sink it and all drown together. No one has the right to commit that crime, neither…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 Lebanese President Joseph Aoun slams Iran and Hezbollah: These negotiations are neither a sign of weakness, retreat, nor concession. They are a decision driven by our firm belief in our rights, our commitment to our people, and our responsibility to protect our country by all means—especially our refusal to die for anyone but Lebanon @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩谈下一阶段团结的必要性：所有黎巴嫩人都在同一条船上。我们要么明智地驾驶它直到抵达安全的彼岸，要么就让它沉没，大家一起淹死。没有人有权犯下那种罪行，无论是……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩抨击伊朗和真主党：这些谈判既不是软弱、退缩，也不是让步的迹象。它们是一个基于我们对自身权利的坚定信念、对人民的承诺以及我们通过一切手段保护国家的责任而做出的决定——特别是我们拒绝为黎巴嫩以外的任何人而死。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇲🇹 🇮🇷 🇴🇲 The Maltese flagged cruise ship Celestyal Discovery has become the first passenger vessel to transit the Strait of Hormuz since the conflict began. The Malta-flagged ship departed Dubai without any passengers on April 17 after remaining docked for around 47 days, having first arrived in early March. The vessel has now crossed the strait and is heading toward Muscat, Oman, with an expected arrival on April 18. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇲🇹 🇮🇷 🇴🇲 马耳他籍游轮“Celestyal Discovery”号成为自冲突开始以来第一艘通过霍尔木兹海峡的客船。这艘马耳他籍船只在停靠约47天后，于4月17日离开迪拜，船上没有乘客，该船最初于3月初抵达。目前该船已穿过海峡，正驶向阿曼马斯喀特，预计于4月18日抵达。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Lebanese President Joseph Aoun said the ceasefire achieved in Lebanon is the result of the people’s sacrifices, steadfastness, and the efforts of all Lebanese officials with regional and international partners. “You confirmed to the world that we are here to stay, no matter what,” he told the nation. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩表示，在黎巴嫩达成的停火协议是人民牺牲、坚定不移以及所有黎巴嫩官员与地区和国际伙伴共同努力的结果。“你们向世界证实，无论发生什么，我们都会留在这里，”他告诉全国人民。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱🇱🇧 Lebanese President Joseph aoun slams Hezbollah: To those gambling with Lebanon’s fate and the lives of the Lebanese people, I say “enough.” Only the state project is the strongest, most enduring, and the most secure for everyone. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 Lebanese President Joseph aoun on the necessity of unity in the next phase: All Lebanese are in the same boat. Either we steer it wisely until we reach safe shores, or we sink it and all drown together. No one has the right to commit that crime, neither under the pretext of a slogan, nor out of a suicidal impulse, nor in loyalty to anyone other than Lebanon and its people. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱🇱🇧 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩抨击真主党：对于那些拿黎巴嫩的命运和黎巴嫩人民的生命进行赌博的人，我说‘够了’。只有国家项目才是最强大、最持久、对每个人最安全的。” @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩谈下一阶段团结的必要性：所有黎巴嫩人都在同一条船上。我们要么明智地驾驶它直到抵达安全的彼岸，要么就让它沉没，大家一起淹死。没有人有权犯下那种罪行，无论是借口口号，还是出于自杀冲动，亦或是出于对黎巴嫩及其人民以外任何人的忠诚。 @wfwitness
